negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for diamond_mine_negative
% SZS output start Proof for diamond_mine_negative
1. stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [input(axiom)]
5. feuds_with(imperium,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & feuds_with(imperium,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & feuds_with(imperium,X0)) [negated conjecture 6]
9. ! [X0] : (~stable(X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~feuds_with(imperium,X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
10. stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 1]
12. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [cnf transformation 4]
13. feuds_with(imperium,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 5]
14. ~feuds_with(imperium,X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~stable(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
15. ~includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) | ~stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 13,14]
16. ~stable(diamond_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 15,12]
17. $false [forward subsumption resolution 16,10]
% SZS output end Proof for diamond_mine_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
